assertions.title: Server starts and listens on port 4200

steps.action: Send GET request to /graphql with a 5 second timeout.
steps.expected: A valid HTTP response proves the server is listening on localhost:4200.
steps.observed: Received HTTP 200 from /graphql, confirming the server accepted the connection on port 4200.

assertions.title: GraphQL endpoint accepts POST with JSON content-type

steps.action: POST {"query":"{ __typename }"} to /graphql with Content-Type: application/json and no Authorization header.
steps.observed: Received HTTP 200 with body {"errors":[{"message":"Not authenticated"}]}, so the endpoint rejected the unauthenticated JSON POST instead of returning Query typename.

assertions.issues: Unauthenticated JSON POST returned a GraphQL auth error instead of data.__typename = Query.

steps.action: POST unauthenticated query { teams { nodes { id } } } to /graphql.
steps.expected: HTTP 200 with a GraphQL errors array and no meaningful data payload.
steps.observed: Received HTTP 200 with body {"errors":[{"message":"Not authenticated"}]}. No data payload was returned.

steps.action: POST authenticated query { teams { nodes { id key name } } } to /graphql using AUTH_TOKEN from .env.
steps.expected: HTTP 200 with data.teams.nodes containing at least one team.
steps.observed: Received HTTP 200 with data.teams.nodes containing the seeded team INV / Involute.

steps.action: POST query { teams { nodes { id } } } to /graphql with Authorization: Bearer invalid-token-xxx.
steps.expected: Request is rejected with an authentication error.
steps.observed: Received HTTP 200 with body {"errors":[{"message":"Not authenticated"}]}. No data payload was returned.

steps.action: POST malformed authenticated query { nonExistentField } to /graphql.
steps.expected: HTTP 200 or 400 with a GraphQL errors array containing a message.
steps.observed: Received HTTP 200 with errors[0].message = "Cannot query field "nonExistentField" on type "Query"." plus locations and extensions.code.

summary: Tested 7 assertions: 6 passed, 1 failed (VAL-FOUND-003 returned a Not authenticated GraphQL error instead of {"data":{"__typename":"Query"}} for the unauthenticated JSON POST).
